question: How many teams are in the league?
sql: SELECT COUNT(team_id) AS NumberOfTeams FROM teams LIMIT 100

question: List all teams.
sql: SELECT name FROM teams

question: How many players are registered?
sql: SELECT COUNT(player_id) FROM players LIMIT 100

question: List all venues.
sql: SELECT venue_id, name, city, capacity FROM venues LIMIT 100

question: Count players by role.
sql: SELECT role, COUNT(player_id) AS PlayerCount FROM players GROUP BY role ORDER BY PlayerCount DESC LIMIT 100

question: How many overseas players are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(player_id) FROM players WHERE is_overseas = 1

question: How many matches in total?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalMatches FROM matches LIMIT 100

question: How many seasons are stored?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS season_count FROM seasons LIMIT 100

question: How many finals are in the data?
sql: SELECT COUNT(match_id) FROM matches WHERE match_type = 'final' LIMIT 100

question: List distinct batting styles.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT batting_style FROM players LIMIT 100

question: Matches played at each venue.
sql: SELECT v.name AS VenueName, COUNT(m.match_id) AS NumberOfMatches FROM matches m JOIN venues v ON m.venue_id = v.venue_id GROUP BY v.name ORDER BY NumberOfMatches DESC LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 run scorers across all seasons.
sql: SELECT p.name AS PlayerName, SUM(isc.runs) AS TotalRuns FROM innings_scorecards isc JOIN players p ON isc.batter_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name ORDER BY TotalRuns DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 5 wicket takers across all seasons.
sql: SELECT T1.name, SUM(T2.wickets) AS total_wickets FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN bowling_figures AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.bowler_id GROUP BY T1.player_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC LIMIT 5

question: Toss decision distribution (bat vs field).
sql: SELECT toss_decision, COUNT(*) AS decision_count FROM matches GROUP BY toss_decision ORDER BY decision_count DESC LIMIT 100

question: How many matches did Mumbai Indians play?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS MatchesPlayed FROM matches WHERE team_a_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE name = 'Mumbai Indians') OR team_b_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE name = 'Mumbai Indians') LIMIT 100

question: How many matches did Chennai Super Kings win?
sql: SELECT COUNT(m.match_id) FROM matches m JOIN teams t ON m.winner_id = t.team_id WHERE t.name = 'Chennai Super Kings' LIMIT 100

question: Top scoring innings ever (single batter).
sql: SELECT T1.name AS BatterName, T2.runs FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN innings_scorecards AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.batter_id ORDER BY T2.runs DESC LIMIT 1

question: List Royal Challengers Bengaluru's roster.
sql: SELECT p.name, p.country, p.role, p.batting_style, p.bowling_style FROM players AS p WHERE p.player_id IN (SELECT batter_id FROM innings_scorecards WHERE batting_team_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE name = 'Royal Challengers Bengaluru') UNION SELECT bowler_id FROM bowling_figures WHERE bowling_team_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE name = 'Royal Challengers Bengaluru')) LIMIT 100

question: Matches per season.
sql: SELECT T1.year, COUNT(T2.match_id) AS NumberOfMatches FROM seasons AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.season_id = T2.season_id GROUP BY T1.year ORDER BY T1.year LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 venues by matches hosted.
sql: SELECT T1.name, COUNT(T2.match_id) AS MatchesHosted FROM venues AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.venue_id = T2.venue_id GROUP BY T1.venue_id, T1.name ORDER BY MatchesHosted DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which team has won the most titles?
sql: SELECT name FROM teams ORDER BY titles DESC LIMIT 1

question: Best bowling figures (most wickets in a match).
sql: SELECT bowler_id, match_id, innings_number, wickets, runs_conceded FROM bowling_figures ORDER BY wickets DESC LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 batters by total sixes.
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(isc.sixes) AS TotalSixes FROM innings_scorecards isc JOIN players p ON isc.batter_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY TotalSixes DESC LIMIT 5

question: Average runs per innings.
sql: SELECT AVG(runs) FROM innings_scorecards LIMIT 100

question: How many centuries (runs >= 100 in an innings)?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM innings_scorecards WHERE runs >= 100

question: How many half-centuries (50-99 runs)?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS HalfCenturies FROM innings_scorecards WHERE runs >= 50 AND runs <= 99 LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 bowlers by economy (min 20 overs bowled).
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(bf.overs) AS OversBowled, SUM(bf.runs_conceded) AS RunsConceded, SUM(bf.runs_conceded) / SUM(bf.overs) AS Economy FROM bowling_figures bf JOIN players p ON bf.bowler_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING SUM(bf.overs) >= 20 ORDER BY Economy ASC LIMIT 5

question: Dismissal type breakdown.
sql: SELECT dismissal_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM innings_scorecards GROUP BY dismissal_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 100

question: Top batter of each season by total runs.
sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT s.year, p.name, SUM(isc.runs) AS TotalRuns, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.year ORDER BY SUM(isc.runs) DESC) AS rn FROM innings_scorecards isc JOIN players p ON isc.batter_id = p.player_id JOIN matches m ON isc.match_id = m.match_id JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id GROUP BY s.year, p.name) SELECT year, name, TotalRuns FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY TotalRuns DESC LIMIT 100

question: Win count per team across all seasons.
sql: SELECT t.name, COUNT(m.winner_id) AS WinCount FROM teams t JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.winner_id GROUP BY t.team_id, t.name ORDER BY WinCount DESC LIMIT 100

question: List captains.
sql: SELECT p.name FROM players p JOIN match_squads ms ON p.player_id = ms.player_id WHERE ms.is_captain = 1 LIMIT 100

question: How many matches were decided by 10 or more wickets?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Matches FROM matches WHERE win_margin_wickets >= 10 LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 highest team totals in any innings.
sql: SELECT SUM(runs) AS TotalRuns, match_id, innings_number FROM innings_scorecards GROUP BY match_id, innings_number ORDER BY TotalRuns DESC LIMIT 5

question: Head-to-head: Mumbai Indians vs Chennai Super Kings — wins for each.
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t1.name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND t2.name = 'Chennai Super Kings' AND m.winner_id = t1.team_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Mumbai_Wins, SUM(CASE WHEN t1.name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND t2.name = 'Chennai Super Kings' AND m.winner_id = t2.team_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Chennai_Wins FROM matches m JOIN teams t1 ON m.team_a_id = t1.team_id JOIN teams t2 ON m.team_b_id = t2.team_id WHERE (t1.name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND t2.name = 'Chennai Super Kings') OR (t1.name = 'Chennai Super Kings' AND t2.name = 'Mumbai Indians') LIMIT 100

question: Win percentage when winning the toss.
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN winner_id = toss_winner_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS WinPercentage FROM matches LIMIT 100

question: Top 3 wicketkeepers by dismissals (caught + stumped credited to them).
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(CASE WHEN dismissal_type = 'caught' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN dismissal_type = 'stumped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dismissals FROM innings_scorecards ic JOIN players p ON ic.bowler_id = p.player_id WHERE p.role = 'wicketkeeper' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY dismissals DESC LIMIT 3

question: Players from India only.
sql: SELECT * FROM players WHERE country = 'India' LIMIT 100

question: Number of overs bowled by each bowler, top 5.
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(bf.overs) AS Overs FROM bowling_figures bf JOIN players p ON bf.bowler_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY Overs DESC LIMIT 5

question: Average score at Wankhede Stadium per innings.
sql: SELECT AVG(runs) AS AverageScore FROM innings_scorecards WHERE match_id IN (SELECT match_id FROM venues WHERE name = 'Wankhede Stadium') LIMIT 100

question: Who won the 2024 final?
Bowlers with at least 5 wickets in an innings.
Top 5 strike rates among batters with at least 100 balls faced.
sql: SELECT p.name, i.balls_faced, i.runs, (i.runs * 100.0) / i.balls_faced AS strike_rate FROM innings_scorecards i JOIN players p ON i.batter_id = p.player_id WHERE i.balls_faced >= 100 ORDER BY strike_rate DESC LIMIT 5

question: Matches per season grouped by match type.
sql: SELECT match_type, COUNT(match_id) AS Matches FROM matches GROUP BY match_type LIMIT 100

question: Top scoring batter of season 2023.
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(i.runs) AS TotalRuns FROM innings_scorecards i JOIN players p ON i.batter_id = p.player_id JOIN seasons s ON i.match_id = s.season_id WHERE s.year = 2023 GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY TotalRuns DESC LIMIT 1

question: Total sixes per season.
sql: SELECT s.season_id, SUM(i.sixes) AS TotalSixes FROM innings_scorecards i JOIN matches m ON i.match_id = m.match_id JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id GROUP BY s.season_id ORDER BY s.season_id LIMIT 100

question: How many matches did each venue host in 2024?
sql: SELECT v.name, COUNT(m.match_id) AS MatchesHosted FROM venues v JOIN matches m ON v.venue_id = m.venue_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', m.match_date) = '2024' GROUP BY v.name LIMIT 100

question: Number of all-rounders per team (based on roster).
sql: SELECT t.name, COUNT(ms.player_id) AS AllRounders FROM teams t JOIN match_squads ms ON t.team_id = ms.team_id JOIN players p ON ms.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.role = 'all-rounder' GROUP BY t.name LIMIT 100

question: Players who have captained at least 5 matches.
sql: SELECT p.player_id, p.name, COUNT(ms.squad_id) AS MatchesCaptained FROM players p JOIN match_squads ms ON p.player_id = ms.player_id WHERE ms.is_captain = 1 GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name HAVING COUNT(ms.squad_id) >= 5 LIMIT 100

question: Average win margin in runs for matches won batting first.
sql: SELECT AVG(win_margin_runs) AS AverageWinMargin FROM matches WHERE toss_decision = 'bat' AND winner_id = team_a_id LIMIT 100

question: Top 5 dot ball bowlers across all matches.
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(bf.dot_balls) AS TotalDotBalls FROM bowling_figures bf JOIN players p ON bf.bowler_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY TotalDotBalls DESC LIMIT 5
